description: Cancer burden and disease status assessments. Progression/worsening should only be called if the tumor is growing. If burden_type is cancer_site, add another cancer_site subfield to specify the location.

items.name: Burden Assessor Type
items.description: Type of clinician making the assessment (e.g., radiologist, oncologist)

items.name: Burden Assessment Date
items.description: Date of the burden assessment. Format YYYY-MM-DD when possible.

items.name: Burden Type
items.description: Type of burden assessment result: response/improvement, progression/worsening, or cancer_site

items.name: Cancer Site
items.description: Location of cancer burden when burden_type is cancer_site (e.g., brain, bone, liver, lung, adrenal, lymph_node)
